summary: Reopened #303 (ADR-021): action_cards table + migration 014, ActionCardsRepo idempotent upsert on (shop_id, workflow_key), persist_scoring_result, Celery refresh_action_cards task, POST/GET /v1/action-cards. Scoring pipeline unchanged. 7/7 contract tests + 11 scoring regression tests pass.

criticalFindings.description: ShopScopedRepo.upsert updates fields via setattr but SQLite in-memory tests may not auto-bump updated_at without explicit flush/refresh; integration test passes on current driver.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Consider explicit updated_at=datetime.now(UTC) on upsert if cross-driver drift appears.

criticalFindings.description: Fujiwa poll skipped when TIKTOK_APP_KEY/SECRET absent — dev refresh uses stale aggregates only.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Document in runbook; production must set TikTok app credentials for poll-before-score.

interfaceChanges.description: Lists persisted active action cards for shop.

mappings.criterion: ActionCardsRepo upsert idempotent second refresh updates not duplicate
POST action-cards refresh returns 202 enqueues without inline run
two consecutive refreshes same row count
No Redis dependency Postgres only store

reviewerSignoff.statement: Reviewed reopened #303 Action Card persistence against ADR-021; no blocking findings.
